sp_instance.placeholder_template: {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
sp_instance.title: Favorites

sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_b1b101ec9359c350945375dcebba1004
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>true</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>true</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,mobile,tablet</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>1</order><placeholder_dimensions>{
  "mobile": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "desktop": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "tablet": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  }
}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) {
    return {
        "mobile": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "desktop": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "tablet": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        title: gs.getMessage("My favorites")
    };
}]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><div class="skeleton-loader-container your-favorites-skeleton-loader panel panel-wrapper">
  <div class="panel-heading b-b">
    <h3 class="panel-title">
     {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
    </h3>
  </div>
  <div class="skeleton-loader-body panel-body" ng-class="{'simple-list': options.list_type == 'simple_list'}">
    <div class="skeleton-loading-card-container" ng-class="options.card_behaviour == 'single' ? 'single-view' : 'wrap-view'" ng-if="options.list_type == 'card_list'">
      <div ng-repeat="x in ([].constructor(options.visible_favorites*1)) track by $index" class="skeleton-loading-card">
        <div class="skeleton-item skeleton-item-quarter-width"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-item skeleton-item-full-width"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skeleton-loader-simple-list-container" ng-if="options.list_type == 'simple_list'">
      <div ng-repeat="x in ([].constructor(options.visible_favorites*1)) track by $index">
        <div class="skeleton-item skeleton-item-half-width"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="2">39b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10fb</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="Your Favorites">b43545e2436fe1108c5d43d488b8f2a5</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-02 10:34:52</sys_created_on><sys_id>b1b101ec9359c350945375dcebba1004</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Favorites</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_b1b101ec9359c350945375dcebba1004</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-02 10:39:07</sys_updated_on><title>Favorites</title><url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
	"visible_favorites": {
		"value": "4",
		"displayValue": "4"
	},
	"show_empty_state": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"sort_order": {
		"value": "recVisited",
		"displayValue": "Recently accessed"
	},
	"list_type": {
		"value": "simple_list",
		"displayValue": "Simple List"
	},
	"load_config": {
		"value": "Async",
		"displayValue": "Async"
	}
}]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=b1b101ec9359c350945375dcebba1004"/></record_update>
